initialBlackMs.label: Void
initialBlackMs.hint: the darkness it is born out of

splitBlackMs.label: Blink
splitBlackMs.hint: a held breath of black before the spark

creationSpeed.label: Urgency
creationSpeed.hint: how fast the birth unfolds (1 = as authored)

crIgnition.label: Ignition
crIgnition.hint: how violent the birth — flares the flash, rays, rings and glow at once

crCoreSize.label: Seed
crCoreSize.hint: the white-hot core it grows from

crRayLength.label: Reach
crRayLength.hint: how far the light spears out

crRingThickness.label: Edge
crRingThickness.hint: weight of the shock rings' stroke

crRingExpand.label: Shockwave
crRingExpand.hint: how far the shock rings ride out

linesBandPx.label: Static
linesBandPx.hint: the test-pattern band before the spark

splashSpeed.label: Patience
splashSpeed.hint: how slowly the two draw together (1 = as authored)

spOrbSize.label: Bodies
spOrbSize.hint: size of the two inspiralling orbs

spCoreDiameter.label: Horizon
spCoreDiameter.hint: the event horizon forming at the centre

spDiskSize.label: Halo
spDiskSize.hint: the accretion ring around the horizon

spShockExpand.label: Quake
spShockExpand.hint: how far the merger's rings ride out

spPlumeReach.label: Plumes
spPlumeReach.hint: how far the gas plumes fling out

spFlashSize.label: Detonation
spFlashSize.hint: the merger flash at the moment they meet

spDustCount.label: Density
spDustCount.hint: how many motes fill the field

spDustSpiral.label: Gravity
spDustSpiral.hint: how hard the field winds inward

spArms.label: Symmetry
spArms.hint: fold the motes into N spiral arms (0 = free swirl)

spArmTwist.label: Vortex
spArmTwist.hint: curl the arms tighter with radius

spWave.label: Bloom
spWave.hint: flower the field into petals (uses Symmetry)

spSwirlOsc.label: Breath
spSwirlOsc.hint: the field breathes in and out as it turns

spColorCycle.label: Chromatic
spColorCycle.hint: drift the dust hue over time

spPulse.label: Heartbeat
spPulse.hint: pulse the whole field's radius rhythmically

spDriftOut.label: Dusk
spDriftOut.hint: how it ends — collapse inward (−) · settle (0) · fly apart (+)

spDustTrail.label: Memory
spDustTrail.hint: motion-smear instead of clearing each frame

spDustFade.label: Mortality
spDustFade.hint: how quickly the motes fade as they travel

spDawn.label: Dawn
spDawn.hint: how it starts — gather slowly inward from far, scattered chaos

spTide.label: Tide
spTide.hint: water — a fluid, rippling current runs through the motes

spPyre.label: Pyre
spPyre.hint: flame — the motes rise, lick upward and flicker

spErosion.label: Erosion
spErosion.hint: crumble — the motes break apart and fall away

spEntropy.label: Entropy
spEntropy.hint: disintegrate — the field scatters and dissolves into noise

spMandala.label: Mandala
spMandala.hint: kaleidoscopic geometry — mirror the field into N-fold symmetry

spFacet.label: Facet
spFacet.hint: crystallise — soft motes harden into faceted shapes

spTurb.label: Turbulence
spTurb.hint: chaos — restless, noisy motion through the field

spUndertow.label: Undertow
spUndertow.hint: a counter-current dragging against the swirl

creationBeatMs.label: Threshold
creationBeatMs.hint: how long the First burns before the Last begins

creationToSplashMs.label: Seam
creationToSplashMs.hint: overlap of the two — negative = no black gap

splashHoldMs.label: Dwell
splashHoldMs.hint: how long the Last lingers before it ends
